body.title: CLOSED: ADC MCP tool: propose_change — formal code change proposals for CC review
body.result: propose_change + list_proposals MCP tools; adc.code_proposals table; 5 tests
body.description:
The Librarian can research and identify improvements but has no way to formally propose a code change for CC review. Informal channel messages get lost; there's no queryable proposal queue.

Proposed shape: Create `adc.code_proposals` Postgres table (id UUID PK DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), file_path TEXT, old_snippet TEXT, new_snippet TEXT, rationale TEXT, related_ticket_id TEXT NULL, status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', proposed_by TEXT, proposed_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NULL). Add `propose_change(file_path, old_snippet, new_snippet, rationale, related_ticket_id=None)` MCP tool — inserts row, posts brief channel notification ('librarian: code proposal for <file_path>, see list_proposals()'). Add `list_proposals(status='pending')` companion tool. Logs to action_log.

**Affected files:** new migration for `adc.code_proposals`, new `agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/tools/proposal_tools.py`, update `agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/tools/__init__.py`
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; postgres-only; no-TheIgors-imports; CC makes all apply decisions
**Scope boundary:** propose_change + list_proposals only. No auto-apply; no diff generation (caller supplies old/new snippets). Duplicate proposals (same file_path + old_snippet) are allowed — dedup is CC's call.
**Test plan:** propose_change inserts row in adc.code_proposals; list_proposals returns it; channel notification sent; second call with same args creates second row (no silent dedup).
